hero.subtitle_rest: and neuroscience backed tools to overcome pornography addiction. Privately, on your phone.

features.dhikr_desc: 17 categories with Arabic, transliteration, translation, and hadith sources.
features.blocker_desc: Blocks haram content across all browsers and apps. Strictness levels, schedules, and SafeSearch.
features.analytics_desc: Patterns, vulnerable times, weekly scores, five-level mood check-ins.
features.salah_desc: Prayer tracking and workout logging tied to recovery scoring.

organizations.label: For MSAs & Youth Groups
organizations.title: Your members are struggling in silence. Give them a way out.
organizations.body: Purchase invite codes for your community. Register trusted mentors. Members get anonymous, one-on-one access to guidance — without ever revealing who they are.
organizations.chat_msg1: I keep falling back. I don't know who to talk to about this.
organizations.chat_msg2: You're not alone in this. That's exactly why we're here. Let's work through it together.
organizations.chat_msg3: You really can't see who I am?
organizations.chat_msg4: I see "Mentee 7". That's it. This is completely anonymous.
organizations.step1_body: Buy a batch of invite codes for your community. Set how many can be redeemed and when they expire.
organizations.step2_body: Give mentor codes to trusted people — imams, counselors, older students. They create a visible profile so mentees know who they're speaking to.
organizations.step3_body: Share mentee codes at halaqas, group chats, or on a flyer. Members join anonymously with one tap.
organizations.step4_body: Mentees message mentors one-on-one. They show up only as "Mentee 1", "Mentee 2". Real identities are never exposed. Full app access at no cost.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: We're here to help.
support.contact_body: For any questions, issues, or feedback, reach out to us at ihsanappios@gmail.com. We aim to respond within 48 hours.
support.manage_body: Subscriptions are managed through the App Store. To cancel or change your plan:
support.manage_item2: Tap your name at the top
support.manage_item4: Select Ihsan and choose your option
support.delete_body: All personal data is stored locally on your device. To delete it, simply uninstall the Ihsan app. To request deletion of server-side data (community posts and anonymous analytics), contact us at ihsanappios@gmail.com.
support.crisis_body: Ihsan is not a substitute for professional help. If you are experiencing a mental health crisis, please call your local emergency services.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Ihsan ("we", "our", "the app") is a privacy-first recovery tool for Muslims. This Privacy Policy explains, in plain language, how we handle personal information when you use the Ihsan iOS application and this website. Because the topics Ihsan addresses are sensitive, the app is designed to keep the most personal content on your device and to collect only what is needed to operate the features you choose to use.
privacy.summary_item1: Your most personal content — your journal, recovery activity, moods and workouts — stays on your device.
privacy.summary_item2: Features like signing in, subscriptions, community, mentor chat and notifications rely on an account on our backend.
privacy.summary_item3: We do not sell your personal information, and we never use the content of your journal, moods, urges, or community posts for advertising.
privacy.summary_item4: You can request deletion of your account at any time by emailing ihsanappios@gmail.com.
privacy.account_body: Ihsan uses Sign in with Apple. Apple shares an opaque user identifier with us and, on first sign-in only, may share a name and an email address (which you can route through Apple's private relay). We never receive your Apple ID password. The identifier, and your name if provided, become your account and default display name.
privacy.device_body: Content that reflects the core of your recovery — including your journal, streak and urge history, mood check-ins, pledges, workouts, prayer tracking, onboarding answers and app preferences — is kept in local app storage on your iPhone and is not uploaded to our servers. Deleting the app removes this data permanently. This local data benefits from the standard data-protection features iOS provides when your device is locked with a passcode.
privacy.server_body: To run account sign-in, subscriptions, community, mentor chat, notifications and basic product metrics, our backend processes a limited set of categories: your account identifier and display name, your subscription status, any organization or team you belong to, content you publish to the community or submit as feedback, direct messages you exchange with an assigned mentor, a push-notification token if you enable notifications, and anonymous usage metrics describing how the app is used.
privacy.community_body: Posts, replies and likes you share in the community are visible to other signed-in Ihsan users. The community is designed to be anonymous: posts and replies are shown without your name and without your profile. Please still avoid sharing real names, contact details, photos, or information about other people inside the text you write. You can delete your own posts and replies at any time; reports, moderation records and abuse signals may be retained to keep the community safe.
privacy.mentor_body: If your mosque, MSA, or organization has enrolled you, you may be matched with a mentor or, as a mentor, with mentees. Mentors have a display name and an optional avatar image. Direct messages between an assigned pair are stored on our backend so they can be delivered and displayed. Access is restricted to the two participants, but messages are not end-to-end encrypted — treat mentor chat the way you would treat any cloud-hosted conversation.
privacy.analytics_body: We use a limited set of product analytics to understand how the app is used and to fix problems. We may also run paid advertising campaigns — for example on social platforms — and, to measure how those campaigns perform, we may use standard mobile-advertising attribution tools, including Apple's privacy-preserving SKAdNetwork and, where applicable, attribution products offered by advertising platforms or third-party providers. These tools tell us, in aggregate, whether an ad led to an install or to a basic in-app action such as starting a trial; they are not used to build advertising profiles about individuals. If any such tool requires your consent under iOS (for example, the App Tracking Transparency prompt), we will ask you before enabling it. We do not sell your personal information, and we never use the content of your journal, urge and trigger logs, moods, mentor chats, or community posts for advertising or attribution.
privacy.subscription_body: Subscriptions are sold and billed by Apple through the App Store. We receive subscription-status updates from Apple so we can reflect whether your account is in a trial, active, cancelled, expired or billing-issue state. We never see your payment card, Apple ID password, or billing address. Apple's privacy policy also applies to your purchase.
privacy.blocker_body: The content blocker works on your device using iOS's DNS and Network Extension frameworks. When active, your device routes DNS lookups to a public family-filtering resolver and enforces SafeSearch on supported search engines. We do not log or receive the websites you visit — those queries are answered directly by the third-party resolver, which has its own privacy policy. Filtering is best-effort and cannot be guaranteed to block every unwanted site.
privacy.permissions_body: The "mirror" crisis tool opens your front camera to display a live preview with a Quranic reminder; no photo or video is captured, saved, or transmitted. If you become a mentor and choose to set an avatar, the app will ask for access to your photo library or camera and upload the image you select so it can be shown in-app to your mentees.
privacy.sharing_body: We do not sell or rent your personal information. We rely on a small set of trusted service providers to operate the app — including cloud infrastructure that hosts our backend, a subscription-status service that relays App Store updates, and a push-notification delivery service. These providers only process information on our behalf, and only to the extent necessary to provide the relevant feature. Depending on the provider, your information may be processed in the United States or the European Union. Apple additionally processes information in connection with Sign in with Apple, App Store billing and push notifications under its own privacy policy.
privacy.retention_body: On-device data is retained for as long as the app is installed. Deleting Ihsan from your iPhone removes it permanently. Server-side data is retained while your account exists. You can request deletion at any time by emailing ihsanappios@gmail.com from the address Apple associated with your account, or by using the in-app delete option if available. Some records may persist in backups for a limited period, and content needed to protect community safety (for example, the records behind a valid report) may be retained in anonymized form.
privacy.rights_body: Depending on where you live (for example, under the EU or UK GDPR, or the California CCPA/CPRA), you may have the right to:
privacy.rights_item1: Access a copy of the personal information we hold about you
privacy.rights_item2: Correct information that is inaccurate or incomplete
privacy.rights_item3: Delete your account and associated data
privacy.rights_item4: Object to, restrict, or withdraw consent to specific processing, and lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority
privacy.children_body: Ihsan is intended for adults. The only circumstance in which a minor may have an Ihsan account is enrollment by a participating organization through our Team program, and only after the minor's parent or legal guardian has provided verifiable consent in the form required by applicable law. The enrolling organization is responsible for obtaining and retaining that consent before distributing an invite code to a minor. If you are a parent or legal guardian and believe your child is using Ihsan, you can contact ihsanappios@gmail.com to review the information associated with your child's account, correct it, withdraw your consent, or have it deleted. We will also delete any account we learn is being used by a minor without the required consent.
privacy.changes_body: We may update this Privacy Policy as the app evolves. Material changes will be signalled by updating the "last updated" date at the top of this page and, where appropriate, an in-app notice. Continued use of Ihsan after an update constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
privacy.contact_body: For privacy questions, data access requests, or deletion requests, contact ihsanappios@gmail.com. We aim to respond within 30 days.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") are a binding agreement between you and the operator of Ihsan ("we", "our", "the app"). They govern your use of the Ihsan mobile application, this website, and all related features. By downloading, installing, signing in to, or otherwise using Ihsan, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms and to the Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, do not use the app.
terms.acceptance_body: By downloading, installing, or using Ihsan you agree to be bound by these Terms. These Terms, together with Apple's standard End User License Agreement for App Store applications, form the complete agreement between you and us regarding the app.
terms.eligibility_body: Ihsan addresses a sensitive adult topic, including content about pornography addiction recovery. You must be at least 18 years old, or the age of majority in your jurisdiction (whichever is higher), to download, install, sign up for, or subscribe to Ihsan on your own. By using the app, you represent and warrant that you meet this requirement. A minor may use Ihsan only if they have been enrolled by a participating mosque, MSA, school, or other organization through our Team (invite-code) program AND their parent or legal guardian has provided verifiable consent to that use as required by applicable law. Minors cannot purchase a subscription. If we become aware that a person has accessed the app without meeting these requirements, we may suspend or delete the account at our discretion.
terms.description_body: Ihsan is a self-improvement and spiritual support application. Features include a streak and recovery tracker, crisis-intervention tools (panic button, guided breathing, grounding, urge surfing, mirror prompt and others), dhikr and dua libraries, Salah and workout tracking, a mood journal, educational articles, an anonymous community, mentor-mentee chat for enrolled organizations, scheduled reminders, and an optional device-level content blocker. Features may change, be added, or be removed at any time.
terms.account_body: To access most features you must sign in with Apple. You are responsible for maintaining the security of the Apple ID you use to sign in and for all activity that occurs under your account. You agree to provide accurate information, to keep it updated, and not to impersonate another person. You may sign out at any time, and you may request account deletion as described in the Privacy Policy.
terms.billing_body: Ihsan offers an auto-renewing premium subscription. Unless explicitly waived in-app, you are first granted a free trial period. At the end of the trial, your subscription converts to a paid plan under these terms:
terms.billing_item1: Payment is charged to your Apple ID at confirmation of purchase, or at the end of any applicable free trial.
terms.billing_item2: Your subscription automatically renews for the same period at the then-current price unless you cancel at least 24 hours before the end of the current billing cycle.
terms.billing_item3: Your Apple ID will be charged for renewal within 24 hours before the end of the current period.
terms.billing_item4: You can manage, change, or cancel your subscription at any time from iOS Settings › [your name] › Subscriptions. Deleting the app does not cancel the subscription.
terms.health_body: Ihsan is a self-help and spiritual support tool. It is not a medical device, telehealth service, or clinical treatment. Ihsan does not diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any medical, psychiatric, or addictive disorder, and it is not a substitute for professional advice from a licensed physician, therapist, counsellor, or qualified Islamic scholar. If you are in crisis, having thoughts of self-harm, or need urgent help, contact your local emergency services immediately.
terms.community_body: The anonymous community exists so that Muslims can support one another in recovery. When posting, replying, liking, or messaging other users, you agree that you will not:
terms.community_item1: Post pornographic, sexually explicit, or graphically violent content, or describe relapses in explicit detail
terms.community_item2: Harass, bully, insult, threaten or incite violence against any person or group
terms.community_item3: Share personally identifying information about yourself or others (real names, phone numbers, addresses, photos)
terms.community_item4: Post spam, advertising, referral links, religious fundraising, or promote other products or services
terms.community_item5: Impersonate another person, mentor, scholar, or organization
terms.community_item6: Post content that is unlawful, violates the intellectual-property rights of others, or violates Apple's App Store content guidelines
terms.content_license_body: You retain ownership of the posts, replies, messages, and other content you submit through the app ("Your Content"). By submitting Your Content, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, sublicensable license to host, store, reproduce, translate, display, and distribute Your Content solely for the purpose of operating, improving, and securing Ihsan, including anti-abuse, moderation, and backup. You represent that you have the right to submit Your Content and that it does not infringe any third-party rights.
terms.ugc_disclaimer_body: Community posts, replies, and mentor messages are created by other users — not by us. We do not generate, pre-screen, endorse, verify, or adopt any user-submitted content, including any religious, medical, psychological, scientific, or personal advice it may contain. We may, but have no obligation to, monitor or moderate content, and any moderation we perform does not make us the author or publisher of the content. Views expressed by other users are their own. You rely on user-submitted content at your own risk, and we disclaim all liability for decisions you make based on it or for any harm that results from reading, sharing, or acting on it. If you believe content violates these Terms, please use the in-app report feature or email ihsanappios@gmail.com.
terms.mentor_body:
If your mosque, MSA, school, or other organization enrolls you through the Team program, you may use the mentor-mentee chat. Mentors are volunteers or community members chosen by the enrolling organization — not our employees or agents — and are not licensed therapists, doctors, or scholars unless they hold those credentials independently. Mentor guidance is personal opinion and encouragement, not clinical advice, not a religious ruling (fatwa), and not a substitute for professional help. We do not verify mentor credentials, we do not supervise mentor conversations, and we do not endorse or adopt any specific advice a mentor gives. You use the mentor feature entirely at your own risk, and we disclaim all liability for the accuracy, safety, appropriateness, or consequences of anything a mentor says or does. If a mentor ever asks for money, personal information, or to move the conversation off-app — or behaves in a way that makes you uncomfortable — stop engaging and report them to ihsanappios@gmail.com.

Organizations that purchase or distribute invite codes are solely responsible for: (i) selecting, vetting, training, and supervising their mentors, including conducting any background checks they consider appropriate; (ii) ensuring their members meet our eligibility requirements; and (iii) where any invite code is given to a minor, obtaining verifiable parental or legal-guardian consent in advance, in the form required by applicable law, and retaining records of that consent. By distributing an invite code to a minor, the organization represents and warrants that it has obtained that consent. Organizations agree to indemnify us for any claim arising out of their failure to meet these responsibilities.
terms.blocker_disclaimer_body: The content blocker uses public third-party DNS filters and iOS's Network Extension framework to block adult content across apps and browsers. DNS filtering is inherently imperfect — it may fail to block some harmful sites and may occasionally block legitimate ones. It can also be bypassed, for example by changing network settings, using another device, or using apps that embed their own DNS. You agree that the blocker is a support tool, that we do not guarantee any specific level of protection, and that you remain responsible for your own choices.
terms.prohibited_body: You agree not to, and not to encourage or assist others to:
terms.prohibited_item1: Use Ihsan in any way that violates applicable laws, regulations, or the rights of others
terms.prohibited_item2: Reverse-engineer, decompile, or attempt to extract the source code of the app, except where expressly permitted by law
terms.prohibited_item3: Attempt to access accounts, data, or server resources that are not yours, or circumvent rate limits, row-level security, or moderation tools
terms.prohibited_item4: Use bots, scrapers, or automated means to create accounts, post content, or send messages
terms.prohibited_item5: Upload viruses, malicious code, or content intended to disrupt the service
terms.prohibited_item6: Use the service to solicit, groom, exploit, or endanger any minor
terms.termination_body: We may suspend or terminate your access to all or part of Ihsan at any time, with or without notice, if we reasonably believe you have violated these Terms, have violated applicable law, or pose a risk to other users, to mentors, or to our infrastructure. You may terminate your account at any time by requesting deletion as described in the Privacy Policy. Sections of these Terms that by their nature should survive termination (including intellectual property, disclaimers, limitation of liability, indemnification, and governing law) will survive.
terms.ip_body: Ihsan, its name, logo, user interface, source code, educational articles, notification copy and original illustrations are owned by us or our licensors and are protected by copyright, trademark and other laws. Quranic verses, ahadith, duas and classical scholarly references are quoted for educational purposes and attributed to their original sources. Nothing in these Terms grants you any right in our intellectual property other than the limited, revocable, non-transferable, non-exclusive license to use the app for your personal, non-commercial benefit.
terms.liability_body: Ihsan is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, including warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, non-infringement, uninterrupted operation, or the accuracy of any content. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, exemplary, or punitive damages, or for any loss of profits, revenue, data, goodwill, spiritual benefit, or recovery outcomes, arising out of or relating to your use of the app. Our total aggregate liability to you for all claims arising out of or relating to these Terms or the app will not exceed the greater of (a) the amount you have actually paid us for the app in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim, or (b) USD 50.
terms.indemnity_body: You agree to defend, indemnify and hold harmless us and our officers, employees, mentors, and contractors from any claims, damages, liabilities, costs, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or related to Your Content, your use of the app, your violation of these Terms, or your violation of the rights of any third party.
terms.law_body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of New York, United States, without regard to its conflict-of-laws rules. Any dispute arising out of or relating to these Terms or the app will be resolved exclusively in the state or federal courts located in the State of New York, and you consent to personal jurisdiction and venue there. Nothing in this section limits any mandatory consumer-protection rights you have under the laws of your country of residence.
terms.changes_body: We may revise these Terms as the app evolves. When we do, we will update the "last updated" date at the top of this page and, where appropriate, provide in-app notice. Continued use of Ihsan after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. If you do not agree to the revised Terms, you must stop using the app.
terms.language_body: These Terms may be translated for convenience. In the event of any conflict or inconsistency between the English version and any translation, the English version prevails.
terms.contact_body: Questions about these Terms can be sent to ihsanappios@gmail.com.
